name: Dynavap - Titanium Tip: Hyper
summary: Dynavap - Titanium Tip: Hyper — a accessory for keeping your kit running.
description: The DynaVap Hyper Titanium Tip is specifically designed to fit with the Hyper Cap, providing a unique and enhanced experience through its advanced Tip & Cap pairing. This medical grade titanium tip boasts a larger chamber volume (average of 0.25g), providing connoisseurs with a "session style" vaping experience. For maximum impact, pair it with the Hyper Cap for massive rips and heavy hits. Please be aware that the Hyper Tip is only compatible with the Hyper Cap. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
